summary: This is a very brief index/link post from Joel Spolsky's blog, not a substantive article. It links to a separate essay where Joel responds to what he considers a 'completely wrong idea' published in Upside magazine. The post also mentions he's back in New York City and wishes readers a happy Passover. There is essentially no argumentative content in this entry itself.
key_points: Joel links to a response essay criticizing an idea from Upside magazine
He dismisses both the idea and the magazine itself as not worth reading
The post is a brief navigational entry rather than a standalone article
money_quotes: Where do these people get their (unoriginal) ideas?
key_insight: This is a stub post linking to a fuller essay, offering no substantive standalone content to analyze.
